notes: Porta Sampler: added Gate and Loop Gate playback modes, widened pitch range to 0.25x-4x, redesigned bank soft-takeover so switching banks no longer causes value jumps, and fixed several pot/LED/playback bugs. Added the Multi-Band Gate module. Fixed manually-placed Pot/Button modules not reading the physical control selected in the Inspector. AudioRecorder: added non-destructive trim/loop/reverse editing.
